---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What workflow is awkward or missing today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. How would it work from the user's side?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Prior art from other git clients (Fork, GitKraken, Sublime Merge, …),
mockups, or links.
